rule: Routes may enter this registry as planned, but no route may enter sitemap, production navigation, or production output until it is published and passes the Quality Gate.

routes.title: bisulfid.com — Global Sovereign Sulfur Intelligence Gateway
routes.description: The sovereign reference layer for sulfur terminology intelligence — where German chemical language, English bisulfide search intent, industrial sulfide systems, and multilingual reference architecture converge.
routes.notes: Primary gateway page. Hub of the internal link graph. Features the Interactive Term Map.

routes.title: What Is Sulfur? — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference introduction to sulfur: chemical element, industrial relevance, safety context, and global presence.
routes.notes: Entry-point page for general readers. Layer 01 — Public Gateway.

routes.title: Sulfur Compounds — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference overview of sulfur compounds: sulfides, bisulfides, disulfides, and their industrial and chemical significance.
routes.notes: Layer 01 — Public Gateway. Bridge between public entry point and terminology system.

routes.title: Sulfur Uses — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference overview of sulfur uses across agriculture, industry, and materials science.
routes.notes: Layer 01 — Public Gateway. Entry point toward industrial intelligence layer.

routes.title: What Is Bisulfid? — bisulfid.com
routes.description: The governed reference page for the term Bisulfid: German-form spelling, chemical meaning, linguistic boundary with English bisulfide, and industrial context.
routes.notes: Layer 02 — Core terminology page. Center concept of the asset. High authority requirement.

routes.title: Bisulfid vs. Bisulfide — bisulfid.com
routes.description: The governed comparison of German Bisulfid and English bisulfide: spelling boundary, chemical meaning, and language-governed distinction.
routes.notes: Layer 02 — Core DE/EN boundary page. Central to asset thesis.

routes.title: Sulfid vs. Sulfide — bisulfid.com
routes.description: The governed comparison of German Sulfid and English sulfide: chemical nomenclature, spelling convention, and industrial relevance.
routes.notes: Layer 02 — Terminology system. Supports and parallels bisulfid-vs-bisulfide argument.

routes.title: Bisulfide, Hydrosulfide, and Sulfide — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference page disambiguating bisulfide, hydrosulfide, and sulfide: chemical distinctions, naming conventions, and industrial context.
routes.notes: Layer 02 — Terminology disambiguation. Chemical precision required.

routes.title: Sodium Bisulfide — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference page for sodium bisulfide (NaHS): industrial uses, chemical identity, supply chain context, and safety overview.
routes.notes: Layer 03 — Industrial Intelligence. High risk: safety context required. No handling instructions.

routes.title: Disulfide Bonds — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference page for disulfide bonds: chemical structure, biochemical role, protein stability, and materials context.
routes.notes: Layer 05 — Future Materials. Bridges terminology system to biochemistry and materials science.

routes.title: Industrial Sulfur Systems — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference overview of industrial sulfur systems: supply chain context, procurement language, and industrial buyer logic.
routes.notes: Layer 03 — Industrial Intelligence. No unverified market data.

routes.title: Sulfur Safety Context — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed safety context page for sulfur: reference information for awareness only. No handling instructions. No prescriptive advice.
routes.notes: Layer 04 — Safety Governance. Strict: no handling instructions, no dosage, no prescriptive thresholds.

routes.title: Hydrogen Sulfide Risk — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed safety context page for hydrogen sulfide (H2S): reference awareness information only. No handling instructions. No prescriptive advice.
routes.notes: Layer 04 — Safety Governance. Highest risk page. H2S is acutely hazardous. No prescriptive thresholds, no emergency response instructions.

routes.title: SDS and Sulfur Terms — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference page on Safety Data Sheets and sulfur terminology: how SDS documents use sulfur compound names, without prescriptive safety advice.
routes.notes: Layer 04 — Safety Governance. Explains SDS terminology context only. No prescriptive advice.

routes.title: Protein Disulfide Structure — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference page on protein disulfide structure: the role of disulfide bonds in protein stability, folding, and biochemical function.
routes.notes: Layer 05 — Future Materials. Establishes asset relevance in biochemistry and advanced materials.

routes.title: Molybdenum Disulfide — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference page on molybdenum disulfide (MoS2): chemical structure, industrial lubricant uses, and advanced materials context.
routes.notes: Layer 05 — Future Materials. Extends terminology system into advanced industrial materials.

routes.title: German-English Chemical Terms — bisulfid.com
routes.description: A governed reference page on German-English chemical nomenclature: how German chemical spelling differs from English and why it matters for industrial and scientific communication.
routes.notes: Layer 02 — Terminology System. Supports the German identity layer argument.

routes.title: Sulfur Terminology Glossary — bisulfid.com
routes.description: The governed sulfur terminology glossary: all controlled terms, definitions, and relationships in the bisulfid.com ontology.
routes.notes: Central reference page. Driven by sulfur_terms.json ontology. All terms must be source-validated before page publishes.

routes.title: Sources — bisulfid.com
routes.description: The public-facing source registry for bisulfid.com: all verified sources cited in published content.
routes.notes: Driven by source_registry.json. Only published when source registry has verified entries.

routes.title: The Bisulfid Signal — bisulfid.com
routes.description: The Bisulfid Signal: the sovereign sulfur intelligence newsletter for industrial readers, researchers, and strategic buyers.
routes.notes: Phase 02 revenue layer. No factual claims requiring sources.

routes.title: Acquire bisulfid.com — Strategic Acquisition Inquiry
routes.description: Strategic acquisition inquiry for bisulfid.com — the global sovereign sulfur intelligence gateway. For qualified buyers only.
routes.notes: Layer 05 / Quality Gate 10. Must not name specific company targets. Strategic asset value framing only.
